ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "brew_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was brewed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the batch in liters */,
  "gravity" REAL /* Initial gravity of the batch */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe used for the batch */,
  "yeast_strain" TEXT /* Yeast strain used for the batch */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of beer (e.g., IPA, Stout, Pale Ale) */,
  "grains" TEXT /* List of grains used in the recipe */,
  "hops" TEXT /* List of hops used in the recipe */,
  "yeast" TEXT /* Yeast strain used in the recipe */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Brewing instructions for the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the event belongs to */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the event */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the event */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the batch at the time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewer, quality control specialist, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_status" (
  "batch_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch status */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., brewing, fermentation, packaged) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the batch status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_status_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_notes" (
  "batch_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch note */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the batch */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_notes_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_files" (
  "batch_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch file */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pdf, jpg, csv) */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date the file was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_files_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, view batch, add note) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_permissions" (
  "batch_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch permission */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_permissions_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
